[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up selfie-style video frame shows a person facing the camera with a hand gesture near their face, displayed within a mobile app or video player interface.

Main Subject:
A person is shown from the upper face down to the upper chest, wearing a light-colored headscarf that frames their face. Their eyes are open and directed toward the camera, with dark eyeliner and prominent eyelashes, and they appear to be wearing lipstick. They hold one hand up under their chin with fingers spread in a “V”/peace-like gesture, with the palm facing the camera.

Setting:
The background is unclear and mostly obscured by the close-up framing and headscarf. The scene appears to be indoors or in a darkened interface view, with lighting focused on the face.

Visual Details:
The mobile UI surrounds the video: at the top there is a dark status bar area with small icons, and beneath it a web or app bar containing the text “caumania.space.” In the center upper area of the screen are two rounded rectangular buttons labeled “KHUSUS SMP” and “KHUSUS SMA,” each with a small square icon to the left. The video itself has a dark border and shows a portion of the person’s shoulders, including a dark outer layer with a light zipper line. The face is brightly lit compared to the dark interface, creating strong contrast.

The image is a mobile video player screen showing a close-up of a person wearing a light headscarf and making a hand gesture under their chin toward the camera. The rest of the image consists of app and video playback interface elements with visible labels and buttons.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
